releaseNotes:
Agent activity sidebar release.

Highlights:
- Moves detailed Agent execution activity out of the conversation stream into a dedicated right-side activity panel.
- Keeps Agent activity persistent by loading all saved runs and events for the selected chat, not only the currently running task.
- Adds a collapsible panel layout so the conversation and input return to full width when the activity panel is closed.
- Adds responsive sizing and vertical-only scrolling to keep activity content from overlapping, clipping the chat input, or creating horizontal scroll.

Fixes:
- Removes the transient live activity card from the message list so completed runs no longer leave stale spinning activity UI behind.
- Preserves live updates in the new panel while continuing to show lightweight run status in the top status bar.

Validation:
- Added regression coverage for persistent Agent activity history ordering.
- Passed Release tests and App/Updater builds.
